title: Supply Chain Manager - Pickrr - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Pickrr - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pickrr! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pickrr:
Pickrr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pickrr!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
